name: Bully Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the sugar, eggs, and butter until well combined.
2. Stir in the flour and baking powder.
3. Gradually add the milk, mixing until smooth.
4. Fold in the chopped dates and nuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle an additional 1/2 teaspoon of flour over the top of the dates and nuts.
7. Bake at 300°F for 40 minutes or until set.
